import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
  let count = tokens.len()
  if count == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    mut sum = 0
    mut i = 0
    while i < count
      let token = match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        t
      when None
        ""
      end
      let n = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      sum = sum + n
      i = i + 1
    end
    let avg = sum / count
    print("avg=#{avg}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
